title: Chef's Bubble Feast
subtitle: Solo Developer | Gen AI Art | Mobile
description: A mobile bubble shooter puzzle game featuring AI-generated artwork, designed and developed entirely as a solo project. Built for both Android and iOS, currently released on Android via the Google Play Store.

highlights.name: Solo Development
highlights.detail: Designed, developed, and published the entire game as a solo project from concept to release.

highlights.name: 200-Level Campaign
highlights.detail: Features 200 campaign levels of varying difficulty, offering players a substantial and progressively challenging experience.

highlights.name: Cross-Platform
highlights.detail: Built for both Android and iOS. Currently live on Android via the Google Play Store.

highlights.name: Gen AI Art
highlights.detail: All game artwork was created using generative AI tools, enabling a rich visual style without a dedicated art team.

roles: Solo Developer — full game design, programming, and publishing
Designed and implemented 200 campaign levels of varying difficulty
Art direction and integration of generative AI artwork
Mobile optimisation and cross-platform release management
details: Chef's Bubble Feast is a bubble shooter puzzle game developed entirely as a solo project. Players work through a 200-level campaign of varying difficulty, making it accessible to casual players while offering a real challenge as levels progress. The game was built to support both Android and iOS platforms and is currently live on Android via the Google Play Store. All artwork was created using generative AI tools, allowing for a rich visual style without a dedicated art team. The game was designed, developed, and published under the Krazy Kraken Games label.
